scenario_description: The user first provides the meeting time for the agent to fill in, then provides the meeting location.

command:
printf 'Meeting Notice

Issued: July 5, 2025

To All Relevant Personnel:

The 2025 Q3 Planning Meeting will be held soon. Please attend on time.

Meeting Topic: Q3 Goal Breakdown and Action Plan
Meeting Time:
Meeting Location:
Chair: General Manager Chen Gang

Agenda:
1. Q2 Work Summary
2. Q3 Goals Presentation
3. Departmental Action Plan Presentations

Administrative Department
' > /home/user/Desktop/meeting_notice.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me fill in the meeting time: August 15, 2025 at 9:00 AM
Now add the meeting location: Main Conference Hall, 1st Floor, then save
